title: PriestResponse
description: Result of a single engine run.

text.description: Raw text returned by the provider. Always the unmodified string — parsing is the caller's responsibility. Null on error.

tool_calls.description: Tool calls requested by the model. Non-null exactly when execution.finished_reason is 'tool_calls'. The caller executes them and re-runs with the results appended to request.tool_exchange. See behavior/tool-calling.md.

usage.description: Token usage. Null if the provider did not return usage data.

session.description: Session state after this run. Null if no session was used.

error.description: Error details if the run failed. Null on success.

metadata.description: Caller metadata echoed from PriestRequest.metadata unchanged.

ok.description: Derived property: true when error is null. Not a stored field — implementations must compute it.

provider.description: Provider name from the request config.

model.description: Model name from the request config.

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock time from start of run() to return, in milliseconds.

finished_reason.description: Normalized finish reason. 'tool_calls' when the model requested tool execution. 'error' when the run failed. Null if the provider did not report one.

total_tokens.description: input_tokens + output_tokens. Null if both are null.

is_new.description: True if this run created the session.

turn_count.description: Total number of turns in the session after this run.

PriestErrorModel.title: PriestErrorModel
PriestErrorModel.description: Structured error in PriestResponse.error. Distinct from the PriestError exception thrown for PROVIDER_NOT_REGISTERED.

code.description: Error code. See behavior/error-codes.md for all defined values.

details.description: Structured details. All values are strings (non-string values are stringified at creation).
